calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Under Probate Code 15409
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Jonas for and with John Warda (Trustee).

Mr. Jonas stated that the Trustee has authority to sell the Hawaii property, that this issue is moot, but they are requesting to use funds from the sale to pay the bequest to the Veterinarian. The Court stated that the gift to the Veterinarian seems reasonable, but it is not inclined to modify the Trust in any other way. Mr. Jonas stated that Bonnie wanted to provide for the Beneficiaries golden years and that there are very little funds to pay for the Beneficiaries care and for the house. Mr. Warda stated that the San Francisco property was sold, that he paid back Mr. Vizzio the sum of $106,000.00 and that he now has money sitting in an Openheimer account. Mr. Warda also stated that Mr. Vizzio does not want to live in San Francisco, that he has medical issues and that he wants to live in Sonoma to be closer to his Mother, and that from a tax persective, it would be horrible to keep that pot of money in the Trust. The Court stated that the Trust is very clear as to what happens if the Husband no longer wants to live in San Francisco. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust is granted in part and denied in part. The proposed order will be modified to reflect the Court's ruling.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Z. Grimaldi. Not reported.
